title: CTOV - Domesticated Innovation Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Domestication Inovation mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Domesticated Innovation. You will find pet shops in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

**Domesticated Innovation mod**

Domesticated Innovation mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/domestication-innovation)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
